name: A+
overview: Battling from the try out ranks to break into first place, Kaliypso Dirgantari must face the top four throne-holders at Bina Indonesia High School: Re Dirgantara, Kenan Aditya, Adinda Aletheia and Aurora Calista. Each propelled by their own motivations, the five fiercely compete for parallel rankings, at least until an epic secret related to the school system is exposed.
